name: task-board-plugin
description: Marketplace for the task-board plugin — a mobile-friendly Kanban + Telegram notifications + onboarding over a project's .claude/tasks board.

plugins.name: task-board
plugins.description: Onboard a project onto the filesystem task-board workflow (/task-board:setup) and send Telegram alerts for idea-proposed / ship-ready (/task-board:notify), reusing the official telegram plugin's bot. The mobile Kanban UI lives in the repo's apps/web.
